preChange.note: all 8 failed both in the full suite AND when their class ran alone — not order/contamination

failures.expected: a top STATUS Text object changes
failures.evidence: ShadowLensMockView.cs:95 `_status = null; // no top status label — the spatial-agent panel owns the single status row`
failures.correction: assert the observable state transition Ready→Analyzed (no removed STATUS label)

failures.evidence: ShadowLensMockView.cs:98 `_decision = null; // the FINDING now renders inside the document footer`; the FindingText lives in the SourceOverlay group (inactive until ShowSource)
failures.correction: assert Analyzed then ShowSource surfaces the populated FindingText

failures.expected: STATUS Text contains READY TO ANALYZE
failures.evidence: ShadowLensMockView.cs:95 `_status = null`; the Ready+UNSIGNED(_trust) contract is intact
failures.correction: drop the removed STATUS assertion; keep State==Ready and TRUST==UNSIGNED

failures.evidence: ShowSource() called LogAction("SHOW_SOURCE") then `if (State==Ready) Analyze()` — Analyze's LogAction("ANALYZE") overwrote it
failures.correction: FIX B: run the internal Analyze FIRST, then LogAction the top-level user action so it wins (ShowSource + ShowAudit)

failures.evidence: ClearCitations used plain Destroy(); childCount (=CitationCount) stayed 1 until end-of-frame, so a same-frame read after SetProfile saw stale citations — exactly UX-06's recorded impact
failures.correction: FIX A: re-parent each chip out (SetParent(null)) BEFORE the deferred Destroy so CitationCount is 0 in the same frame

failures.evidence: ShadowSpatialDemoFixtures.cs:55 emits Act(focus_object,object_id,diff1) THEN Act(highlight_source,source_id,cmd_test); the single focus line shows the LATEST spatial action, so it ends on cmd_test
failures.correction: assert FocusText reflects this query's final coding evidence action (cmd_test), not the non-final diff1

failures.note: the failures list is complete at 8

productionFixes: FIX A — ShadowSpatialAgentPanel.ClearCitations: SetParent(null) before Destroy (fixes 3 cross-profile leaks)
FIX B — ShadowLensMockView.ShowSource/ShowAudit: log the top-level action after the internal Analyze (fixes 1 LastAction)

postChange.skippedReason: env-gated capture harnesses (SHADOW_CAPTURE) — not converted from failures
